working_on: Fix Issues #56 (audit_archive_structured_fields hook bypasses git-mv renames — change pre-commit filter from A to AR + regression test), #57 (macOS Finder duplicate file pollutes engine/session/ — add boot-time stray-file detection probe), and #58 (routine wedge: halted prior session leaves AUDIT-HT in_progress with no recovery path — wedge already resolved at S-0117 administrative-close commit 48a6ac9; this session lands the systemic fix: ADR 0060 + routine_wedge_detect.py + routine-mode-lifecycle skill update + first-exercise readiness note + pytests).
declared_scope: Land three substantive fixes for Issues #56 / #57 / #58 in this session. (1) Issue #56: change `--diff-filter=A` to `--diff-filter=AR` at engine/tools/hooks/pre-commit:233 + add a tmp-dir bare-repo + clone regression test under engine/tools/tests/ that simulates a `git mv current.json archive/S-NNNN.json` close shape with stale archive content and asserts the audit hard-fails (proves the filter now matches R). (2) Issue #57: author engine/tools/probe_session_dir.py modeled on probe_repo.py to scan the parent repo's engine/session/ for filenames matching `^current [0-9]+\.json$` (canonical macOS Finder duplicate pattern); wire into validate.py --health-probe-only so the existing LOUD attention surface in session-start.sh fires; add a regression test asserting exit 1 + path-in-stderr on a fixture with a stray duplicate. (3) Issue #58 systemic fix (the immediate wedge already resolved at the administrative S-0117 close commit 48a6ac9): author engine/adr/0060-routine-wedge-detect-and-pause.md (Nygard template, Status: Accepted; documents wedge-detection shape, idempotency contract via Issue/HANDOFF search-then-author, rollback safety via read-only shared-state policy, alternative considered: auto-administrative-close rejected because session-archive content cannot be safely synthesized without the halted session's outcome_summary input); author engine/tools/routine_wedge_detect.py implementing wedge-detect-and-pause (exit 0 if no wedge; exit 2 with idempotent Issue/HANDOFF artifacts if wedge detected); insert a step 0c into engine/operations/routine-mode-operations.md (Layer 1 doc) and mirror to .claude/skills/routine-mode-lifecycle/SKILL.md; author engine/build_readiness/routine_wedge_detect_first_exercise.md per ADR 0053 (mechanism-first-exercise gate); add pytests against tmp-dir bare-repo + clone fixtures covering well-formed wedge / clean state / ambiguous state. Capture matching MemPalace decision-tagged drawer per project two-layer decision-recording rule. Verify all changes via validate.py end-to-end + pytest suite.
